context_for_next_testing_agent: Settlement generate-monthly endpoint is working correctly. The endpoint: (1) Returns 400 with proper error when no deliveries, credit notes, or factory returns exist, (2) Independently queries credit_notes collection using datetime range, (3) Independently queries distributor_factory_returns collection for warehouse-sourced adjustable returns, (4) Stores total_credit_notes_issued and total_factory_return_credit in settlement document. Monthly reconciliation endpoint returns total_factory_return_credit field. BillingTab shows 7 summary cards with Net Payout = Earnings - ① + ② + ③. Frontend fix applied to enable Generate Settlement button even when there are no deliveries (allows settlement creation with only credit notes or factory returns).

verified: Generate Settlement button is enabled even with no deliveries
Dialog shows proper error message when no data exists
Shows 'No approved settlements found' when no data
Independently queries credit_notes collection with datetime range (line 4153-4159)
Returns 400 when no deliveries AND no credit_notes AND no factory_returns (line 4173-4174)
Creates placeholder account for factory returns when no deliveries (line 4217-4223)
7 summary cards including ③ Factory Returns (line 369-432)
Net Payout formula = Earnings - ① + ② + ③ (line 425)
